creator: sean-freebsd@farley.org
text:
On Mon, 23 Apr 2007, Li-Wen Hsu wrote:

> Hello,
>
> This port seems to create a directory, X11R6/sbin, and doesn't install
> anything under it.  Could you get rid of it?  Thanks very much. :)

I created a new patch[1] that gets rid of the mkdir X11R6/sbin.

Sean
   1. http://www.farley.org/freebsd/tmp/PR/111924/patch
-- 
sean-freebsd@farley.org
